title: CVE-2000-0148 — CVSS 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2000-0148

CVSS Score: 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2000-02-08T05:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

MySQL 3.22 allows remote attackers to bypass password authentication and access a database via a short check string.

References: http://archives.neohapsis.com/archives/bugtraq/2000-02/0053.html, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/975, http://archives.neohapsis.com/archives/bugtraq/2000-02/0053.html
